steps: File tax reclaim with Australian Taxation Office citing AU-NO treaty Article 10 for 15% withholding rate on BHP dividend
Submit Form 1301234567 documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and treaty eligibility for reduced rate
Request Citigroup Australia provide dividend payment confirmation and tax certificate for AUD 138,750 overcollection
Follow up with ATO within 4 years statute of limitations for treaty-based refund processing
